audited_subject.manuscript: Hydroclimatic trends, ENSO teleconnection, and CMIP6 projections in Imbabura Province, Ecuador 1981–2070
audited_subject.author: Pinto-Páez, V. H.
audited_subject.journal: International Journal of Climatology (Wiley · Royal Meteorological Society)

verdict.summary_es: La metodología cumple los estándares internacionales del IPCC AR6, las directrices WMO N° 1203 y la revisión global EDW de Pepin et al. (2022). Supera la práctica habitual andina en tres aspectos: corrección FDR sobre 588 tests, doble reporte per-estación + per-pixel-independiente, y trazabilidad numérica end-to-end.
verdict.summary_en: Methodology meets IPCC AR6 standards, WMO No. 1203 guidelines and the global EDW review by Pepin et al. (2022). Exceeds typical Andean practice in three aspects: FDR correction over 588 simultaneous tests, double per-station + per-independent-pixel reporting, and end-to-end numerical traceability.

score_breakdown.rationale_es: 21 estaciones × 44 años, 4 productos gridded, validación cruzada explícita, hashes SHA-256 de los 20 anuarios INAMHI.
score_breakdown.rationale_en: 21 stations × 44 years, 4 gridded products, explicit cross-validation, SHA-256 hashes of the 20 INAMHI yearbooks.

score_breakdown.rationale_es: MK + Theil-Sen + MMK Hamed-Rao + FDR-BH = state-of-the-art. Bootstrap reproducible. Spearman robusto para ENSO.
score_breakdown.rationale_en: MK + Theil-Sen + MMK Hamed-Rao + FDR-BH = state-of-the-art. Reproducible bootstrap. Spearman robust for ENSO.

score_breakdown.rationale_es: IC 95% bootstrap, IQR inter-modelo (CMIP6), sign agreement (100% T, 80% precip), caveats explícitos en cada figura/tabla.
score_breakdown.rationale_en: Bootstrap 95% CI, inter-model IQR (CMIP6), sign agreement (100% T, 80% precip), explicit caveats per figure/table.

score_breakdown.rationale_es: Zenodo concept DOI, semillas declaradas (42), versiones de librerías documentadas, scripts liberados, trazabilidad Tabla S10.
score_breakdown.rationale_en: Zenodo concept DOI, declared seeds (42), documented library versions, released scripts, S10 Table traceability.

score_breakdown.rationale_es: 5 limitaciones declaradas explícitamente en §5.5, framing honesto del caso adverso (ETP_TERRA), reporte del proceso negativo de extensión INAMHI.
score_breakdown.rationale_en: 5 limitations explicitly declared in §5.5, honest framing of adverse case (ETP_TERRA), reporting of negative INAMHI extension process.

checks_passed.check_es: Corrección de autocorrelación MMK Hamed-Rao reportada como sensibilidad global
checks_passed.check_en: MMK Hamed-Rao autocorrelation correction reported as global sensitivity

checks_passed.check_es: Multiplicidad controlada con FDR-BH a q=0.05 (588 tests ENSO + tendencias)
checks_passed.check_en: Multiplicity controlled with FDR-BH at q=0.05 (588 ENSO tests + trends)

checks_passed.check_es: Pixel collision ERA5-Land identificada (5 píxeles, 10/21 estaciones afectadas)
checks_passed.check_en: ERA5-Land pixel collision identified (5 pixels, 10/21 stations affected)

checks_passed.check_es: Validación cruzada CHIRPS/ERA5 con tres categorías y umbrales declarados
checks_passed.check_en: CHIRPS/ERA5 cross-validation with three categories and declared thresholds

checks_passed.check_es: Bootstrap del lapse rate (1000 réplicas, semilla=42, leave-one-out)
checks_passed.check_en: Lapse rate bootstrap (1000 replicates, seed=42, leave-one-out)

checks_passed.check_es: Bootstrap GEV con filtros de estabilidad numérica
checks_passed.check_en: GEV bootstrap with numerical stability filters

checks_passed.check_es: Selección CMIP6 justificada por disponibilidad y rango ECS amplio
checks_passed.check_en: CMIP6 selection justified by availability and broad ECS range

checks_passed.check_es: Sign agreement como umbral de robustez (alineado IPCC AR6)
checks_passed.check_en: Sign agreement as robustness threshold (aligned with IPCC AR6)

checks_passed.check_es: Trazabilidad end-to-end por afirmación numérica (Tabla S10)
checks_passed.check_en: End-to-end traceability per numerical claim (Table S10)

checks_passed.check_es: Hashes SHA-256 de los 20 anuarios INAMHI (Tabla S1)
checks_passed.check_en: SHA-256 hashes of the 20 INAMHI yearbooks (Table S1)

checks_passed.check_es: Limitaciones declaradas en sección §5.5 dedicada (5 limitaciones)
checks_passed.check_en: Limitations declared in dedicated §5.5 section (5 limitations)

limitations_declared.scope_es: ERA5-Land ~9 km no resuelve la topografía interandina; pixel collision afecta 10/21 estaciones
limitations_declared.scope_en: ERA5-Land ~9 km does not resolve inter-Andean topography; pixel collision affects 10/21 stations

limitations_declared.scope_es: TerraClimate PET pierde significancia bajo MMK Hamed-Rao por AC1=0.47
limitations_declared.scope_en: TerraClimate PET loses significance under MMK Hamed-Rao due to AC1=0.47

limitations_declared.scope_es: MOD16A2GF cubre solo 2001–2024; tendencias no superan FDR-BH
limitations_declared.scope_en: MOD16A2GF covers only 2001–2024; trends do not pass FDR-BH

limitations_declared.scope_es: Ensemble CMIP6 ya bias-adjusted; contraste con observaciones es de signo y magnitud relativa
limitations_declared.scope_en: CMIP6 ensemble already bias-adjusted; observation contrast is sign and relative magnitude

limitations_declared.scope_es: Extensión INAMHI 2014–2025 viable solo con M0105 y M1240; otras estaciones rechazadas por inconsistencia física
limitations_declared.scope_en: INAMHI extension 2014–2025 viable only for M0105 and M1240; other stations rejected by physical inconsistency

international_standards.evidence_es: Per-pixel independence, MMK sensitivity, EDW ≈ 0.15 °C en rango
9 roles cubiertos por autor único, declarados
Datos archivados, código compartido, materiales documentados

regional_comparison.table_caption_es: Comparación con literatura andina similar (5 estudios)
regional_comparison.table_caption_en: Comparison with similar Andean literature (5 studies)

recommended_additional_validations.name_es: Bootstrap re-muestreo de mediana ENSO ρ
recommended_additional_validations.name_en: Bootstrap resample of ENSO ρ median

recommended_additional_validations.name_es: Distribución de Sen slopes por banda

ijc.verdict_es: Defendible. Mejoras 1-2 fortalecen respuesta a revisores pero no son obligatorias.
ijc.verdict_en: Defensible. Improvements 1-2 strengthen reviewer response but are not mandatory.

ndc_ecuador.verdict_es: Apto para integrar a la NDC. Las proyecciones CMIP6 con IQR + sign agreement son el formato estándar UNFCCC.
ndc_ecuador.verdict_en: Suitable for NDC integration. CMIP6 projections with IQR + sign agreement are the UNFCCC standard format.
